steps.title: Connect hardship to departure
steps.content: The second sentence says the Spanish Civil War made it difficult for Vargas to perform in Spain. The next sentence says she left Spain to perform abroad. The transition must show that the departure followed from the difficulty.

steps.title: Eliminate transition mismatches
steps.content: A signals comparison, C begins a sequence, and D introduces an example. The needed transition signals a result. The answer is B.
